Mass Effect: Andromeda — soft-tech SciFi UI

Clawmachine-fit: C. Low-fit: too polished, too soft, too much teal glow. Useful only as counter-example of 'clean SciFi UI we are NOT aiming for'.

Credits: BioWare / EA, Behance (ME:A UI team), julia-singh.com, designbyadel.com.. Internal non-commercial fair-use research reference. Do not redistribute.
